name: Phantom Ten
short_description: 15-meter corridor. Don't miss the anomalies. The game will not end until 10:00.
detailed_description:
15-meter corridor.

Do not miss the anomalies.
If you don't see anomalies, go out the door on the right.
If you see anomalies, go out the door on the left.
The game will not end until 10:00.


A horror game to find the anomalies.
You only have to follow a one-way corridor.
There are no items to collect, no puzzles to solve, and no hiding, running, or fighting.

Phantoms

33

Game modes

Standard mode: If you make a mistake, you start over from midnight.
Easy mode: If you make a mistake, you go back one hour.
Anomalies collection mode: Anomalies will always occur.

Gallery setting

You can specify the phantom that will occur next time.

Controls

Movement: Left stick / WASD
Camera: Right stick / Mouse
Menu: Options button / Esc
